optimizationPolicy: Preservation-first material normalization. Preserve imported UVs, source texture image nodes, hierarchy, pivots, names, and game_id metadata. Do not join meshes or run destructive geometry optimization.

recipes.semanticMaterialRole: preserve imported Sketchfab PBR material and UVs

bakeSettings.method: preserve source textures; adjust Blender material inputs only
bakeSettings.noBakeReason: A320 downloaded source already carries useful UVs/textures; Agent 3 avoids destructive rebake.
